title: CustomHUD
description: Allows You to Write Text to The In-game Screen
body:
CustomHUD is a versatile Minecraft mod designed to enhance your gameplay experience. This mod empowers players with the ability to display custom text overlays on their screens, allowing for a unique and personalized gaming experience. Whether you want to communicate important information, add immersion to your role-playing adventures, or simply express yourself in the world of Minecraft, CustomHUD has you covered.


- Usage:

  /customhud <player> enable true
  
  /customhud <player> color <color> "TEXT"



- Current Features:

 - Text Overlays:

 Easily create and display custom text overlays on your screen. Use commands to add informative 
 messages, role-play dialogues, or anything you desire.
 Colorful Text: Customize the appearance of your text with a variety of colors. Express yourself vividly 
 with colorful messages.

 - Moveable Overlays (Coming Soon):

 Stay tuned for an upcoming update that will allow you to freely move the text overlays on your screen, 
 giving you complete control over their placement.



- Future Enhancements:

 I am actively working on adding even more functionality to the mod. Stay tuned for future updates that may include features like text on different screens and the possibility of displaying images.

Please note that CustomHUD was originally developed to enhance the CustomNPCs mod experience. However, its versatility makes it suitable for any Minecraft adventure, from role-playing to survival.
